narrative:
Boston Twp (precinct in Summit County) has 553 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.4 percentage points.
